instruction: Rewrite the content to meet insurance regulatory and compliance standards.

input.draft_text:
Oman-Based NRIs: 5 Benefits of Term Insurance
NRIs living in Oman might look for financial solutions in India for their family’s financial needs and security. This is where life insurance plans prove useful. Indian life insurance companies offer different types of life insurance policies for NRIs worldwide. You can choose a policy that best aligns with your financial goals and also helps you provide financial security to your family.
When it comes to financial security, term insurance plans prove the most relevant. Aimed to cover the risk of premature demise, term plans provide a death benefit to your family in your absence. This can help your family meet lifestyle expenses and also fulfil their financial goals. So, buying a term insurance plan is a wise financial choice.
5 benefits of term insurance plans
Here are some reasons that make term insurance plans a standout –
Benefit 1: Indian Claim Support:While you can buy a term insurance policy when living in Oman, the claim is settled in India. Your nominee can get complete claim support to get the death benefit without hassles. Here’s how:
There is a 24/7 helpline for existing customers. Your nominee can connect with the insurance company through this helpline for claim support.
There is a dedicated email facility too that can resolve common queries related to claims.
There is a service helpline number too, which is reachable every day from 9 am to 7 pm.
When you are not around, your family or ageing parents can connect with the company and get the claim settled in India.
Benefit 2: Tax Benefits:Term insurance plans offer tax benefits that can help you save tax and save more. Here’s what you can enjoy:
Premiums paid qualify for a deduction under section 80C up to ₹1.5 lakhs. So, if you have a taxable income in India, you can use the premiums to claim a deduction and bring down your tax liability.
The death benefit received from term insurance plans is also tax-free, completely. This gives your family a tax-free corpus which they can use for their financial needs.
Even if you buy return of premium term plans (TROPs), the premiums refunded on maturity qualify for tax exemption, subject to specific conditions. This helps you receive a tax-efficient corpus, which you can use to fulfil your financial goals.
Benefit 3: Easy Medical Tests in Oman:Pre-entrance medical check-ups might be required when you buy a term insurance policy as an NRI from Oman. These medical check-ups can be done in Oman itself, making the purchase process simpler. You can get the check-up done in Oman and send the medical reports to the insurance company back home. The insurer would verify the documents and underwrite your policy.In some cases, the company might also offer you the telemedical facility for medical check-ups for added convenience.The availability of medical check-ups in Oman helps you buy the policy whenever you need, without waiting to plan for a trip to India.
Benefit 4: Coverage While Working Anywhere:Term life insurance plans provide worldwide coverage. This means that the plans cover the risk of uncertain demise, whether you are living and working in India, Oman or any other country in the world. This can give you complete peace of mind knowing your coverage is not country-specific. In the case of your demise during the policy term, your family would receive a death benefit wherever you are.
Conclusion
For NRIs living in Oman, term life insurance plans in India can create a financial cushion for your loved ones. With features like optimal coverage at affordable premiums, easy digital process for buying the plan, tax benefits, and worldwide claim support, the company offers convenience and security. So, wherever life takes you, secure your family’s future with term life insurance plans.
FAQs
What is the claim process for term insurance plans?In the case of a death claim, your nominee should inform the insurance company of the same. The claim form would be required to start the claim process along with some important documents like the death certificate, identity proof of the nominee, policy bond, bank details of the nominee, etc.
Can I pay the premium in Omani Rial?Premiums for life insurance plans are usually paid in INR. However, if you have an NRE or NRO account, you can deposit your earnings in Omani Rial in the account, which would be converted to INR. You can, then, use the balance in the account to pay the premiums in INR.
Can I buy the policy when visiting India?While you can buy the term plan online from Oman, the facility of buying when visiting India is also available. You can buy the policy online or offline when you are visiting India easily.
Disclaimer:
The views stated in this article are not to be construed as investment advice and readers are suggested to seek independent financial advice before making any investment decisions. For more details on risk factors, terms and conditions, please read the sales brochure & policy document (available on www.bajajallianzlife.com) carefully before concluding a sale. Bajaj Allianz Life Insurance Company Ltd., Regd. office Address: Bajaj Allianz House, Airport Road, Yerawada, Pune - 411006, Reg. No.: 116, CIN: U66010PN2001PLC015959, Call us on toll free No.: 1800 209 7272, Mail us: customercare@bajajallianz.co.in
Tax benefits as per prevailing Section 10(10D) and Section 80C (under old tax regime) of the Income Tax Act shall apply. You are requested to consult your tax consultant and obtain independent advice for eligibility before claiming any benefit under the policy
